seed_instruction: Create a plan for celebrating a graduation, incorporating photo sessions, speeches, and guest coordination.
org_constraint: The plan must include at least five bullet points outlining specific tasks.
new_constraint: Do not use bullet points in the response.
instruction: Create a plan for celebrating a graduation, incorporating photo sessions, speeches, and guest coordination. The plan must include at least five bullet points outlining specific tasks. Do not use bullet points in the response.
response: To ensure a seamless and memorable graduation celebration, begin by establishing a comprehensive guest list and sending out formal invitations at least six weeks in advance to manage RSVPs and dietary requirements. Once the guest count is confirmed, book a professional photographer and schedule a dedicated time slot for a formal photo session during the golden hour to capture high-quality portraits of the graduate with family and friends. Coordinate the logistics of the venue by arranging for seating, catering, and a designated area for the ceremony where speeches will take place. Prepare a structured program for the event that includes a sequence for the keynote speeches, ensuring that each speaker knows their allotted time and has a microphone ready. Finally, assign a specific person to act as a point of contact for guests throughout the day to handle questions regarding the schedule, food, and photo locations so the graduate can focus on celebrating the achievement.<turn|>
